suggestions.why_it_matters: Classic N+1: one query per user × 200 users on the dashboard endpoint. Switch to selectinload to batch in one round-trip.
`except Exception: pass` swallows the gateway error you specifically added retry logic for — defeats the purpose of the PR.
numpy.mean on a 5-item Python list costs ~12µs of import + dispatch overhead. Python builtin is ~0.4µs and removes the dep.
Multi-line range showing how start_line + line combine. This block replaces lines 50..53 in the new file.
